mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM person_library pl
AND pl.person_type_id = #{personTypeId}
AND (pl.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.organization LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pl.research_direction LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND pl.approval_status = 'APPROVED'
SELECT pl.*, pt.name AS person_type_name FROM person_library pl LEFT JOIN person_type pt ON pl.person_type_id = pt.id WHERE pl.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO person_library ( person_type_id, user_id, name, gender, phone, email, avatar, title, organization, position, research_direction, achievements, introduction, expertise_areas, status, approval_status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{personTypeId}, #{userId}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatar}, #{title}, #{organization}, #{position}, #{researchDirection}, #{achievements}, #{introduction}, #{expertiseAreas}, #{status}, #{approvalStatus}, NOW(), NOW() )
